title: 1981-04-16_Pat_97.txt
key_claims: Dick concludes that his Ditheon concept is exactly what the ancient Greek Mystery Religions (Orphism) and early esoteric Christianity were trying to achieve: the literal divinization of man.
He notes that the goal of Ditheon is to finally allow the created being (man) to see its Creator (Valis) operating the hidden machinery of the world.

The implantation of the adventitious psyche is not random; it is the result of a divine judgment (eschatological selection). Therefore, an ultra-advanced macro-entity is deliberately directing human evolution by curating who becomes a Ditheon.
He rejects the idea that the second psyche is just a latent part of the brain; he fully embraces that it is an external, resurrected spirit implanted by the Holy Spirit.
recurring_concepts: **The Alien Creator**: Dick is convinced that an extraterrestrial/extra-dimensional life form is camouflaged on Earth, benignly directing our species' evolution toward the Ditheon state.
reading_excerpt: Dick concludes that his Ditheon concept is exactly what the ancient Greek Mystery Religions (Orphism) and early esoteric Christianity were trying to achieve: the literal divinization of man.
